mapper.sql: id, deviceId, temperature, battery, freeHeap, wifiRssi, uptime, createTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_sensor_data (deviceId, temperature, battery, freeHeap, wifiRssi, uptime) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{temperature}, #{battery}, #{freeHeap}, #{wifiRssi}, #{uptime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_sensor_data WHERE deviceId = #{deviceId} ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 1
